poses.name: Arms Crossed
tips: chin slightly down for stronger jaw line

poses.name: Back to Camera
tips: turn shoulders away; soft glance over one side optional
weight even or slight hip shift
hands relaxed at sides or in pockets

poses.name: Chin Rest on Hand
tips: elbow on table or knee; knuckles under chin lightly
eyes soft toward camera or slightly off-axis

poses.name: Coffee Cup (both hands)
tips: hold mug near sternum with both hands
soft smile; steam / cup as lower-third interest

poses.name: Crouch Ready
tips: knees soft, chest open toward camera
hands free near thighs or lightly clasped

poses.name: Hand on Chin
tips: light fingertips on chin; no hard press
eyes slightly above camera or off to side

camera_cues: waist-up or full body with negative space on wave side
poses.name: Hand Wave
tips: raise one hand near shoulder height
soft smile, open torso to camera

poses.name: Hands Behind Back
tips: interlace fingers lightly behind the lower back
roll shoulders back without puffing the chest
shift weight onto one foot for a natural s-curve

poses.name: Hands in Pockets
tips: thumbs out of pockets for natural hands

camera_cues: full body if background is strong
poses.name: Hands on Hips
Jump Mid-Air
tips: point toes and lengthen through arms

poses.name: Kneel Profile
tips: front knee soft; back foot relaxed
chin slightly lifted off the shoulder

poses.name: Lean Forward
tips: hinge from hips, not rounded upper back

camera_cues: shallow depth for bokeh street lights
poses.name: Look Down Phone
tips: hold phone at chest height, elbows soft
chin slightly down toward the screen
weight on one leg for a natural hip shift

camera_cues: waist-up or three-quarter; phone in lower third
poses.name: Phone Scroll (looking down)
tips: chin slightly down toward phone at chest height
elbows soft; keep face lit from above or window side

poses.name: Point Forward
tips: extend arm fully without locking elbow hard
plant front foot toward camera direction

poses.name: Seated Profile
tips: sit tall with weight on one hip
hands relaxed on lap or chair arm

camera_cues: head-and-shoulders or waist-up, arm in frame
poses.name: Selfie Peace Sign
tips: raise hand near cheek with peace (v) sign
slight head tilt, eyes to lens

poses.name: Sit Cross-Legged
tips: hands rest on knees or one hand supports behind

poses.name: Sit on Stool
tips: perch on the front edge of the stool
cross ankles lightly for a clean line
hands on thighs or one on the seat

poses.name: Wall Lean
tips: place one shoulder and hip lightly against the wall
cross ankles or rest the free foot on the toe
keep chin slightly down for a soft gaze

poses.name: Yoga Tree Pose
tips: press standing foot firmly into floor
knee opens to side without twisting hips
hands at heart or overhead with soft shoulders

poses.name: Book Reading (seated)
tips: Hold book at mid-chest; elbows soft
Chin slightly down toward page; eyes toward lens on cue
camera_cues: waist-up seated; soft window side light
